label: gain_without_progress
description: ADR-19 A2.1 — candidate_gain can fire without progress_event. Agent reads src/a.py (the changed file, in U) at t=0 → that's progress. Then at t=1 runs pytest which touches an obligation-scoped file → candidate_gain=True (ran relevant test) but progress_event=False (no new file entered, no obligation closed). Exactly the 'move in the right direction without producing progress' branch the paper anticipates.
